DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR PLAINTIFF'S VIOLATION OF THE COURT'S ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND COMPELLING DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT ADDITIONAL ORDERS TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY WOULD NOT RESULT IN COMPLIANCE. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS ORDERED DISMISSED AND JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to obtain Entry of Judgment is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Judgment on file. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-17-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Pltf'S Violationof The Court'S Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Compelling Deposition Of Pltf
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Plaintiff's Violation Of The Court's Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, And Compelling Deposition Of Plaintiff is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to respond to discovery would not result in compliance. Plaintiff's complaint is ordered dismissed and judgment entered for Defendant. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to show cause to plaintiff's counsel for failure to file Proof of Service on client of Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Proof of service on file. Court ordered the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction extended to 3/15/2010. Order to Show Cause re: Arbitration to be scheduled on 4/15/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2009 Continued To Jan-14-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to file Proof of Service on client of Order Granting Motion to Withdraw is ordered continued to 1/14/2010 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And To Compel Deposition Of Pltf;
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion to compel response to interrogatories and request for production of documents; and to compel deposition of plaintiff granted:
1. All objections to defendant's form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and request for production of documents are waived, except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified responses to defendant's form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and request for production of documents within twenty days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Plaintiff shall appear and provide testimony at her deposition to be held at a time and place to be determined by defendant's counsel; and within forty-five days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-10-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
